channel.title: OSWM Watcher Changeset Activity - Curitiba
channel.description: OSM changeset activity monitoring and deletion watch for OpenSidewalkMap interest features in Curitiba.

item.title: [Alert] High Deletion OSM Changeset 182321412 by Vinicius Moraes (130 deletions)
item.description:
High Deletion Alert for OSM Changeset 182321412 by Vinicius Moraes

Comment: Atualização de supermercado e vias de condomínios residenciais

Deletions to OSWM features: 130

Links: OSM | OSMCha

item.title: [Alert] High Deletion OSM Changeset 179147848 by ftrebien (34 deletions)
item.description:
High Deletion Alert for OSM Changeset 179147848 by ftrebien

Comment: foot=no onde as calçadas foram mapeadas separadamente

Deletions to OSWM features: 34

Links: OSM | OSMCha

item.title: [Alert] High Deletion OSM Changeset 182142041 by Vinicius Moraes (31 deletions)
item.description:
High Deletion Alert for OSM Changeset 182142041 by Vinicius Moraes

Comment: Ajuste de nome arredor do Canal Belém; atualização de dados e correções gerais nos arredores

Deletions to OSWM features: 31
